data.name: Office Perks
data.detailed_description:
ABOUT OFFICE PERKS

Office Perks is an adult visual novel featuring mature dialog and sexually explicit scenes between consenting adults. This version of Office Perks contains the base game consisting of Act 1 and Act 2. Act 3 is currently under development, and updates will be applied to the base game as they become available.

Please note: Office Perks does not contain fully animated scenes but instead opts for (lots of) high quality two frame loops. Absolutely NO AI was used in the making of this game, period.

-- Office Perks is 100% HUMAN MADE / NO AI --

NEW JOB, NEW TOWN, NEW LIFE

You arrive in Westview Heights having just landed your first real job as a game developer. Sure, you've made some awesome prototypes in your own time, but this is a chance to finally work with an established game studio. Make new friends, meet beautiful and charming women, and climb the corporate ladder...with a few extra "perks" to help you along the way!

BEAUTIFUL GIRLS, UNIQUE PERSONALITIES

Get to know six beautiful, talented, and professional women with distinct personalities and unique storylines. Make deep connections, long lasting relationships, and ultimately choose the love of your life. Spend quality time with all of the girls, take them on dates, enjoy chill out movie nights, and even see if you're compatible in the sack before choosing your soul mate.

HUMOR, CHARM, AND A LIGHTHEARTED TOUCH

Office Perks is a lighthearted adult visual novel with engaging and playful dialog and lots of opportunites for the more intimate moments in the professional and personal lives of 20-somethings. Eat, drink, and be merry with some of the most beautiful girls in Westview Heights.

ADDITIONAL INFORMATION

Office Perks is an adult visual novel featuring mature dialog and sexually explicit scenes between consenting adults. All characters presented in Office Perks are over the age of 18. No AI of any kind was used in the making of Office Perks.

data.short_description: A game dev's job is never easy, but it's a whole lot better when there are perks everywhere you look! Office Perks is a lighthearted slice-of-life adult visual novel loaded with playful dialog and lots of opportunities for the more intimate moments in the lives of 20-somethings.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version 10.11+
  • 處理器: Version 10.11+
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Version 10.11+
  • 處理器: Version 10.11+
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
